rationale: The cited paper appears only as a single, grouped reference in the managerial implications section, where the authors suggest comparing their SPI-signaling results with prior evidence on traffic-building propensity. It is not used to build the paper's learning model, derive hypotheses, define core constructs, or interpret key empirical results in a paper-specific way. This indicates a contextual literature mention rather than a meaningful dependency of the citing paper on that specific study.
